title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud announced new Cloud Run capabilities designed to simplify deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. The updated serverless platform offers improved efficiency, flexibility, and operational efficiency for scaling applications.
writeup: This video from Google Cloud Tech covers new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at simplifying the deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. The updates target the serverless platform, with stated improvements in efficiency, flexibility, and operational efficiency for scaling applications. The relevance lies in extending serverless infrastructure to support inference, an area where managing scale and operations has been a recurring challenge.
